name: Premier Energy Corporation
summary: Premier Energy Corporation acquires, explores, develops, and produces crude oil and natural gas in the Russian Federation. The company holds exploration and production license, and operates the North-Kopanskoye oilfield consisting of approximately 3,213 acres of concession area located to the southeast of the city of Orenburg. As of December 31, 2009, it had proved reserves of approximately 15,651 trillion barrels of oil equivalent. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Dallas, Texas.
